body:
## CAL-2351 CEO SPRINT MONITOR — Day 2 Checkpoint (2026-04-27/28 Boundary)

✅ **Day 1 (2026-04-27) VERIFIED COMPLETE**
- Articles 1-2 published + quality gates PASS
- Build verified clean: 908 pages
- Live site trust verified
- All team heartbeats GREEN
- Zero blockers escalated

⏱️ **Day 2 (2026-04-28) NOW ACTIVE**
- CMO checkpoints: 10:00, 14:00, 23:59 UTC
- UX monitoring: continuous (build stable)
- QA monitoring: continuous 30-min cadence
- Build blocker resolved (package-lock.json @ 00:40 UTC, commit 6105f56)

🎯 **Phase 1 SEO Optimization: COMPLETE**
- 4 quick-win keywords optimized (Tier 1)
- Meta descriptions: updated
- H1 tags: strengthened
- Internal linking: cluster established
- 908 pages built clean (commit 6c2ca57)
- Ready for SERP monitoring (expect 2-5 position gain week 1)

🚨 **CTO GSC Blocker (Non-Launch-Critical)**
- Task: Add service account to GSC, verify access
- Deadline: 2026-04-28 12:00 UTC (1-hour task)
- Status: Escalated, awaiting execution
- Impact: Blocks KPI reporting only

🎯 **Gate Decision Window (2026-04-29 08:00 UTC)**
- Team verification due
- Final quality gates
- Launch authorization pending

🚀 **Launch (2026-04-30 00:00 UTC)**
- All systems nominal
- On track

**Status: All systems GREEN. No blockers. Proceeding.** → Next checkpoint Day 2 EOD (2026-04-28 23:59 UTC)
